name: Direct Google Form to AI Video

values.content: You are a UGC video script writer. Create authentic, conversational 15-second scripts for user-generated content style ads. Keep it natural and relatable.

parameters.subject: =Your AI Video is Ready - {{ $('Extract Talk ID').first().json.product_name }}
parameters.message:
=

Your AI Video is Ready!

Hi there,

Your UGC-style video for {{ $('Extract Talk ID').first().json.product_name }} has been generated successfully!

Video URL:
{{ $json.result_url }}

Generated Script:
{{ $('Extract Talk ID').first().json.generated_script }}

Request ID: {{ $('Extract Talk ID').first().json.request_id }}

Thanks for using our AI Video Generator!

nodes.name: Send Email with Video
nodes.notes: Optional: Configure SMTP to send email notifications

meta.description: Receives Google Form submissions directly via webhook, generates script with OpenAI, creates video with D-ID
